message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontColor black
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam noteFontColor black
skinparam linetype ortho

title 类图

class User {
    int id
    string name
    string github (github地址)
    string sex
    string picture
}

class Teacher {
    int teacherNumber (工号)
    string office (办公室)
    string phone
}

class Student {
    int studentNumber (学号)
    string class (班级)
}

class Login {
    int id
    int username (学生账号就是学号，老师账号是工号)
    string password
    int role (角色)
}

class TeacherCourse {
    int id
    int teacherId
    int courseId
}

class StudentCourse {
    int id
    int studentId
    int courseId
}

class Course {
    int id
    int courseNum
    string name
    string term
    float credit (学分)
}

class Experiment {
    int id
    string name (实验名)
    Date date (实验发布时间)
    string github (实验的github地址)
    int courseId (与Course类的id关联)
}

class Scoreitem {
    int id
    int complexScore (复杂度得分)
    int completeScore (完成度得分)
    int answerScore (答辩得分)
}

class Experimentscore {
}

class Experimentcore {
    int id
    int studentId (与学生关联)
    int scoreitemId (与scoreitem关联)
}

User <|-- Teacher
User <|-- Student

Teacher "1" -- "n" TeacherCourse
Student "1" -- "n" StudentCourse
TeacherCourse "n" -- "1" Course
StudentCourse "n" -- "1" Course
Course "1" -- "n" Experiment

Experiment "1" -- "n" Scoreitem
Scoreitem "n" -- "1" Experimentscore
Student "1" -- "n" Experimentscore

note right of TeacherCourse
    “老师选课”类
end note

note right of StudentCourse
    “学生选课”类
end note

note right of Scoreitem
    一个scoreitem实例就表示了一个
    学生的一个实验成绩
end note

@enduml
